footer.tagline: Field activity recorded. Operations organized. Reports verifiable.

landing.problem_subtitle: It's not an organization problem. It's a proof problem.
landing.us_badge: 🇺🇸 Serving US teams, chat support 9am–6pm ET, USD invoicing on request.

core.subtitle: TimeTracker records on the field. Flow organizes in the office. Verifier certifies everything matches. A closed loop, no gaps.

products.name: GeoTapp Flow Business
products.desc: The complete solution for structured companies and complex organizations.

products.name: GeoTapp Flow Team
products.desc: Coordinate and manage your operational team in real time.

products.name: GeoTapp Flow Solo
products.desc: Everything you need to manage field jobs independently.

simulator.enterprise_desc: For large organizations we offer tailored solutions.

quantum-logistics.short: Plan interventions, visualize the operational calendar and manage team availability without overlaps.
quantum-logistics.full:
### Full View of Planned Work.

Without a shared calendar, planning becomes chaotic.
**Intervention Calendar** gives you clear operational visibility.

#### Advanced Planning

View all interventions on daily, weekly and monthly calendar views.
Identify overlaps and optimize workload distribution.

#### Team Availability

See who is available, who is on leave and who is already overloaded.
Assign new interventions without creating operational conflicts.

the-architect.short: Organize work into phases, tasks and deadlines. Keep the project under control without spreadsheets or WhatsApp messages.

the-oracle.full:
### Operational Data, Not Assumptions.

Deciding without reliable data is dangerous.
**Operational Visibility** turns field data into concrete information.

#### Operational Dashboard

See in real time:
- Open and in-progress interventions
- Active technicians
- Interventions completed today and this week

#### Periodic Reports

Receive automated activity summaries.
Compare periods, identify bottlenecks and optimize operations.

event-horizon.full:
### No Shift Conflicts.

Organizing mobile personnel requires clarity.
**Shift Planning** gives the manager a precise, up-to-date view.

#### Calendar View

See who works when.
Identify absences, holidays and overlaps before they become operational problems.

#### Real-time Availability

Employees confirm attendance or report absences directly from the app.
The manager sees gaps in the schedule before assigning new jobs.

unit-matrix.full:
### Know Your Team.

Every operator is a key operational resource.
**Operator Registry** centralizes all vital information.

#### Certification Management

See at a glance who holds the required qualifications for a specific intervention or site.

#### Rapid Onboarding

Adding a new technician is simple.
Send an invite link: within minutes they are operational on GeoTapp TimeTracker.

sector-grid.short: Create a database of operational sites and worksites. Link each intervention to the correct location and organize teams by zone.
sector-grid.full:
### Every Intervention in the Right Place.

Working without geographic reference generates confusion.
**Sites and Worksites** brings operational clarity.

#### Site Database

Create a catalog of client sites, worksites and operational locations.
The system automatically links technician activity to the intervention site.

#### Zone-based Teams

Organize technicians into teams by site or geographic area.
Assign interventions to the correct team, not just the individual.

identity-forge.short: Upload your logo and choose your company colors. Your operators use an app that reflects your brand identity.
identity-forge.full:
### Your Company, Your App.

Do not use a generic app.
Make your employees feel part of YOUR company with a consistent visual experience.

#### Company Logo

Your logo prominently displayed on the login screen and main dashboard.

#### Company Colors

Choose the color theme that fits your corporate image.
Professional, consistent, recognisable.

trial.form_plan_note: The plan's user count refers to GeoTapp Flow (office management / CRM). GeoTapp Timetracker licenses for field operators are a separate subscription, with a maximum number included depending on the chosen plan.
trial.form_seats_hint: Separate subscription for field operators (mobile app). Limit included in plan: Solo max 2, Team max 5, Business unlimited. You can adjust licenses after activation.

features.cdn_desc: Speed is geographic. Our static assets are replicated across 300+ data centers worldwide. Whether your client is in New York or Tokyo, your site loads as if the server were in the next room.
